title: AgentReady calibration feedback record
description: Structured record of the evaluation loop described in docs/product/evaluation.md: real repository -> findings -> agent/reviewer run -> false-positive/false-negative notes -> detector, policy, or documentation improvement. Not part of AgentReady's runtime report contract (schemas/*.schema.json, generated from Zod by bin/agentready-emit-schemas.ts) -- this shape is hand-maintained input to the benchmark/backlog process, not scanner output.

commit.description: Commit the review was performed against, if known.

reviewMethod.description: How this record's findings were produced. 'manual-expert-review' means a human read the repository directly, independent of any AgentReady scan -- the case this schema exists to capture, per docs/product/evaluation.md's benchmark loop.

agentreadyScan.description: The AgentReady scan being calibrated against, if one was run.

observedAutonomyEnvelope.description: Optional per-stage autonomy assessment observed during review (see AgentStage in each finding's affectedStage). Keys are free-form stage/activity labels, not required to match affectedStage exactly, since this describes an aggregate judgment rather than a single finding.

classification.description: true_positive: AgentReady found it with a useful severity. false_negative: AgentReady did not report it at all. severity_mismatch: AgentReady found it but ranked it too low (or too high) for the risk it represents. policy_mismatch: default severity is reasonable, but a stricter operating context (enterprise, autonomous-merge, ...) should treat it differently. not_observable_locally: the repository's local contents cannot prove this either way (e.g. branch protection, required reviews) -- AgentReady's local-first, non-networked scan guarantee means this can only ever be reported as unverified, never inferred.

agentreadyFindingId.description: The existing finding id this compares against (e.g. 'safety.capability.high-risk'), or null for a false_negative/not_observable_locally with no corresponding id yet.

affectedStage.description: Which agent-autonomy stages this finding affects. See docs/product/evaluation.md.

observedFriction.description: What an agent (or its reviewer) would actually experience because of this gap.

recommendedLayer.description: Which part of the scan/policy/analysis/enrichment pipeline (docs/product/evaluation.md, docs/product/policy-packs.md) should own a fix, if any.

verificationStatus.description: Whether an AgentReady maintainer re-checked this finding against the repository directly, or it is carried as-reported from the source review. Required so a calibration record never silently reads as more verified than it is.
